stemHtml: The pilot of jet aeroplane with swept-back wings is preparing for a right turn to intercept the final approach. To tighten the turn, he/she uses full right rudder deflection only. As a consequence...

options.a: the left wing could stall due to slip and generate a roll to the left.
options.b: the right wing could stall due to skid leading to an unwanted attitude.
options.c: there is an increased risk of overshooting the final approach due to adverse yaw.
options.d: the fin could stall due to excessive rudder application.
